entries.title: UnitedHealth Spends $1.5 Billion on AI and Wants Double Back
entries.summary: UnitedHealth Group is processing 500 million transactions this year through Optum Real, an artificial intelligence-first claims and reimbursement platform. By year end, that number is expected to hit 2.5 billion. That volume already puts Optum Real among the highest-throughput transaction platforms in American healthcare — and the platform launched only a few quarters ago. The […] The post U

entries.title: Adobe Plans Outcome-Based Pricing for New AI Product Suite
entries.summary: Adobe plans to use outcome-based pricing for its new suite of artificial intelligence (AI) products called Adobe CX Enterprise, The Information reported Tuesday (April 21), citing its interview with Adobe President Anil Chakravarthy. While the company hasn’t disclosed the details, this pricing policy will be based in part on the value the product produces, such as the number of ad […] The po

entries.title: Google Embeds AI Into Chrome for 3.5 Billion Users
entries.summary: Google has embedded two new artificial intelligence (AI) features into Chrome, putting Gemini inside the purchase journey before shoppers reach a buying decision. Skills for Gemini lets users save AI prompts and replay them on any webpage with a single click. An update to AI Mode in Chrome means clicking a search result now […] The post Google Embeds AI Into Chrome for 3.5 Billion Users appe

entries.title: Big banks seek to ease security worries as AI push accelerates
entries.summary: “AI is our friend, OK?” said Morgan Stanley CEO Ted Pick during the bank’s earnings call as the industry grapples with its disruptive potential.

entries.title: Wells Fargo CEO: Trump entitled to his own Fed views
entries.summary: In an Economic Club interview Monday, Charlie Scharf also said there’s “clear consensus that it would be the wrong thing” to lower interest rates until there’s an end in sight to the Iran war.

entries.title: Truist CEO defends bank’s growth plans
entries.summary: Asked about M&A – including whether the bank would consider selling – CEO Bill Rogers said he didn’t “know how to be more clear, that that's just not a priority for us.”

entries.title: Small Businesses Stop Chasing Amazon on Delivery Speed
entries.summary: The old adage holds: Shoppers “want what they want, when they want it.” In retail, that “when” has always meant now. Conventional wisdom long ago hardwired “now beats later” into eCommerce strategy, pushing logistics in a single, seemingly irreversible direction: faster. Two-day shipping gave way to next-day, which gave way to same-day, and now, […] The post Small Businesses Stop Chasing Ama

entries.title: New York Sues Coinbase and Gemini Over Prediction Markets
entries.summary: New York sued Coinbase and Gemini Titan Tuesday (April 21), alleging that the companies’ prediction market platforms are illegal, unlicensed gambling operations. The state’s Office of the Attorney General (OAG) alleged in a Tuesday press release that prediction market platforms fit New York’s legal definition of gambling, that Coinbase and Gemini failed to obtain […] The post New York Sues C

entries.title: Lloyds taps chief data and AI officer
entries.summary: Sameer Gupta will join the bank in June, the latest in a string of AI-focused appointments across the financial services industry.

entries.title: Amazon Recasts Marketplace Fraud as a Broader Trust Problem
entries.summary: Amazon is making a broader argument about fraud in online commerce. The threat is no longer limited to fake handbags, copycat electronics and trademark abuse. It now stretches across scams, fake reviews, product safety, organized retail crime and seller manipulation. In its first “Trustworthy Shopping Experience” report, Amazon said it is using artificial intelligence (AI), […] The post Amaz

entries.title: Lawmakers Question JetBlue About Surveillance Pricing Allegations
entries.summary: JetBlue is facing scrutiny over whether it uses surveillance pricing. Two members of Congress said in a Tuesday (April 21) press release that they sent the airline a letter Monday (April 20) requesting information about whether it uses customer data and artificial intelligence to set prices for consumers. Surveillance pricing is the use of […] The post Lawmakers Question JetBlue About Survei

entries.title: MiCA Forces Crypto Firms to Get Licensed or Get Out
entries.summary: Europe’s Markets in Crypto-Assets regulation (MiCA) was never designed to be subtle. Born as a sweeping attempt to impose order on a fast-moving, often opaque crypto sector, it put stablecoins squarely at the center of its ambitions. Now the clock is running out. In a Friday (April 17) statement, the European Securities and Markets […] The post MiCA Forces Crypto Firms to Get Licensed or Get

entries.title: Capital One’s Q1 Shifts Attention From Spending to Strategy
entries.summary: Consumers are still spending, and for Capital One, that remains the foundation of its cards business while the financial service giant continues to eye longer term artificial intelligence and platform buildouts. “The U.S. consumer remained healthy, and the overall economy remained resilient through the first quarter,” CEO Richard Fairbank said during the earnings call […] The post Capital On

entries.title: Prediction Market Kalshi Targets Crypto Perpetuals
entries.summary: Kalshi plans to expand beyond prediction markets and enter the crypto market by adding perpetual futures on bitcoin and other crypto tokens in the United States, The Information reported Tuesday (April 21), citing unnamed sources. Crypto perpetuals, which are futures contracts that enable leveraged bets on crypto prices without an expiration date, have been largely off limits to U.S. […] The

entries.title: Fed faults Georgia bank over government lending program
entries.summary: After an exam revealed operational deficiencies with LaGrange, Georgia-based Community Bankshares, the company was ordered to bolster board oversight and senior management, and improve its capital position.

entries.title: JPMorgan to add 400 jobs in Charlotte by 2028
entries.summary: The lender will condense its corporate presence in Charlotte by moving into a 145,000-square-foot space in the city’s SouthPark neighborhood in early 2028, which has room for new hires.

entries.title: Cash App is targeting a new kind of customer: 6- to 12-year-olds
entries.summary: The company is expanding its youth-focused services in an effort to build a relationship with Gen Alpha and the upcoming generation of adolescents in the U.S.

entries.title: The business case for blockchain in B2B payments
entries.summary: Increased regulatory clarity and the rise of stablecoin infrastructure have transformed how digital assets are used.

entries.title: Tapping into the latest emerging payment solution trends
entries.summary: Strategically integrating these solutions can help deliver the seamless shopping customers demand.

entries.title: Why Cognitive Banking is integral to the future of banking
entries.summary: Cognitive Banking helps businesses shift from a product-centric approach to a truly customer-centric one.

entries.title: Fifth Third gets mission ready for Comerica conversion
entries.summary: The Cincinnati-based regional is planning a series of dress rehearsals prior to shifting Comerica customers onto Fifth Third’s platforms, targeted for Labor Day, a bank executive said.

entries.title: FIS, Barclays extend core banking tie
entries.summary: The payments processor has won a multi-year extension of its core banking technology contract with the British financial institution.

entries.title: How the Visa-Mastercard card fee case may end
entries.summary: A federal court is likely to weigh how much a proposed settlement over interchange fees differs from a pact that was rejected two years ago.

entries.title: PayPal, NFL make connection
entries.summary: The digital payments pioneer will team with the professional football league in a bid to move money between fans.

entries.title: Fintechs push bill for Fed payment rail access
entries.summary: House legislation introduced Tuesday would let financial technology firms access Federal Reserve payments rails.

entries.title: Fintechs push bill for Fed payment rail access
entries.summary: House legislation introduced Tuesday would let financial technology firms access Federal Reserve payments rails.

entries.title: ACH Network starts 2026 with surge
entries.summary: The payments network saw growth across healthcare, peer-to-peer, online and direct deposits in the first quarter, pushing the volume value past $24 trillion.

entries.title: CFPB gets pushback over ‘artificial deadline’ on job cuts
entries.summary: A workers union said it took the bureau more than a year to share its latest workforce plan, and questions why the agency seeks approval within a 45-day window.

entries.title: Revolut eyes valuation of up to $200B in eventual IPO
entries.summary: Fintech giant Revolut, which secured a full banking license in the U.K. in March after years of waiting, was most recently valued at $75 billion in a secondary share sale.
